tweets.author: cryptofox.news
tweets.text: Big news from Fidelity! 📈 The number of listed companies holding 1000+ BTC surged from 22 to 49 by late 2025, controlling nearly 5% of Bitcoin supply. By early June 2026, 170-199 listed companies held ~1.265M BTC, or 6% of total supply! #Bitcoin #Crypto #Fidelity

tweets.author: cryptonews-poster.bsky.social
tweets.text: Public companies now hold ~6% of BTC supply! Fidelity report shows a surge from 22 firms with 1000+ BTC end-2025 to ~199 by mid-2026. Corporate treasuries are increasingly embracing crypto. #Bitcoin #Crypto
